artisans.name: Fatima Handcrafts
artisans.description: Beautiful hand-thrown blue pottery inspired by Multan's centuries-old ceramic tradition. Each piece is painted with natural mineral dyes.

artisans.name: Zara Weaves
artisans.description: Traditional ajrak and khaddar fabrics handwoven using century-old techniques passed down through generations of Faisalabad weavers.

artisans.name: Chiniot Furniture Co.
artisans.description: Intricately carved sheesham wood furniture and decorative pieces. Chiniot's finest craftsmen blend Mughal motifs with modern design.

artisans.name: Peshawar Silver Studio
artisans.description: Handcrafted silver jewelry featuring traditional Pashtun patterns. Each piece is made using techniques passed down through three generations.

artisans.name: Sindhi Basket House
artisans.description: Colorful hand-woven baskets made from natural reeds and grasses. Each basket reflects the vibrant colors of Sindhi culture.

artisans.name: Lahore Calligraphy Arts
artisans.description: Urdu and Arabic calligraphy artwork on paper, canvas, and wood. Each piece is a meditation on the beauty of the written word.

artisans.name: Karachi Clay Studio
artisans.description: Contemporary pottery with a modern twist on traditional Pakistani forms. Ideal for home decor and gifting.

artisans.name: Quetta Wool Works
artisans.description: Handmade woolen rugs and shawls from Balochistan. Rich geometric patterns in natural dyes define each unique piece.
